name: RecoilApp::TakeSkipWaitMessage
description: RecoilApp::TakeSkipWaitMessage returns the current skip-wait message flag and clears it to the allowed/zero state.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_app_skip_wait_message VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x442a10 validates loading the skip-wait field at offset 0xd0, clearing that field to zero, and returning the original value with no callees.
The native smoke verifies TakeSkipWaitMessage returns a non-zero stored flag and clears it to zero before exercising the paired MarkSkipWaitMessage helper.
